description_long: This is a male adult figure with outstretched arms, creating a dramatic, wing-like silhouette. He is dressed in a collared, long-sleeve shirt tucked into fitted pants, with a belt visible at the waist. The shirt is buttoned up and the sleeves are extended fully to the sides, giving the impression of a T-pose. The figure's facial features are clearly defined, and he has short, neatly styled hair. His shoes are formal, matching the overall business-casual attire. The proportions and posture suggest a standard adult male, and the clothing fits closely to the body.
description: A male adult in a T-pose, wearing a collared shirt, fitted pants, and formal shoes, with arms extended horizontally.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, outstretched arms, collared shirt, belt, and formal shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the straight arm, and the side of the pants and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the head, shirt, arms, and legs, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, arm, and the side of the pants and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve collared shirt and fitted pants with a belt
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
